targets.rawSql:
select
  ref_month,
  sum(nb_patients_controlled) nb_patients_controlled
from heart360_patients_catagory
where org_unit_id IN (SELECT id FROM get_descendant_ids(((SELECT ou.id FROM org_units ou WHERE ou.id::text = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '') LIMIT 1))))
group by 1

panels.title: Patients protected from heart attacks and strokes with world-class treatment

defaults.displayName: % Patients with  BP <140/90 at latest visit in the past 3 months

targets.rawSql:
select 
    ref_month,
    100.00 * sum(nb_patients_controlled) / (0.000001 + sum(NB_PATIENTS_UNDER_CARE_REGISTERED_BEFORE_THE_PAST_3_MONTHS)) as Control_rate
from HEART360_PATIENTS_CATAGORY
where org_unit_id IN (SELECT id FROM get_descendant_ids(((SELECT ou.id FROM org_units ou WHERE ou.id::text = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '') LIMIT 1))))
group by 1

panels.title: BP controlled at latest visit in past 3 months

defaults.displayName: % Patients with BP ≥140/90 at latest visit in the past 3 months

targets.rawSql:
select ref_month,
    100.00 * sum(nb_patients_uncontrolled) / (0.000001 + sum(NB_PATIENTS_UNDER_CARE_REGISTERED_BEFORE_THE_PAST_3_MONTHS)) as uncontrolled_pct
from HEART360_PATIENTS_CATAGORY
where org_unit_id IN (SELECT id FROM get_descendant_ids(((SELECT ou.id FROM org_units ou WHERE ou.id::text = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '') LIMIT 1))))
group by 1

panels.title: BP uncontrolled at latest visit in past 3 months

defaults.displayName: % Patients with no BP measure recorded in past 3 months

targets.rawSql:
select 
    ref_month,
    100.00 * sum(nb_patients_no_visit) / (0.000001 + sum(NB_PATIENTS_UNDER_CARE_REGISTERED_BEFORE_THE_PAST_3_MONTHS)) as Control_rate
from HEART360_PATIENTS_CATAGORY
where org_unit_id IN (SELECT id FROM get_descendant_ids(((SELECT ou.id FROM org_units ou WHERE ou.id::text = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '') LIMIT 1))))
group by 1

panels.description: Patients with hypertension with at least 1 visit in the past 12 months

targets.rawSql:
select 
    HEART360_PATIENTS_CATAGORY.ref_month,
    sum(cumulative_number_of_patients) cumulative_number_of_patients,
    sum(NB_PATIENTS_UNDER_CARE_REGISTERED_BEFORE_THE_PAST_3_MONTHS) as nb_patients_under_care,
    sum(nb_new_patients) nb_new_patients
from HEART360_PATIENTS_CATAGORY
left outer join heart360_patients_registered
    on HEART360_PATIENTS_CATAGORY.ref_month = heart360_patients_registered.ref_month 
    and HEART360_PATIENTS_CATAGORY.org_unit_id = heart360_patients_registered.org_unit_id
where HEART360_PATIENTS_CATAGORY.org_unit_id IN (SELECT id FROM get_descendant_ids(((SELECT ou.id FROM org_units ou WHERE ou.id::text = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '') LIMIT 1))))
group by 1

panels.title: Patients under care

panels.description: Patients with hypertension with no visit in the past 12 months

defaults.displayName: % Patients with no BP measure recorded in the past 12 months

targets.rawSql:
select 
  heart360_patients_under_care.ref_month,
  (100.0 * sum(COALESCE(heart360_patients_under_care.nb_patients_lost_to_follow_up, 0))) / 
  NULLIF(sum(heart360_patients_under_care.cumulative_number_of_patients), 0) as lost_to_follow_up_pct
from heart360_patients_under_care
where heart360_patients_under_care.org_unit_id IN (SELECT id FROM get_descendant_ids(((SELECT ou.id FROM org_units ou WHERE ou.id::text = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '') LIMIT 1))))
group by 1

panels.title: 12 month lost to follow-up

options.content: Treatment outcomes for patients with hypertension at their latest visit before <u>**${reference_month:date:MMMM YYYY}**</u>

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    child_ou.id as child_id,
    child_ou.name as child_name,
    build_drill_url(child_ou.id) as drill_url,
    CASE WHEN child_ou.level >= 5 THEN
      '/d/heart360_facility?var-Region=' || COALESCE((SELECT lin2.ancestor_id::text FROM org_unit_lineage lin2 WHERE lin2.org_unit_id = child_ou.id AND lin2.ancestor_level = 1), '') ||
      '&var-District=' || COALESCE((SELECT lin2.ancestor_id::text FROM org_unit_lineage lin2 WHERE lin2.org_unit_id = child_ou.id AND lin2.ancestor_level = 2), '') ||
      '&var-Facility=' || COALESCE((SELECT lin2.ancestor_id::text FROM org_unit_lineage lin2 WHERE lin2.org_unit_id = child_ou.id AND lin2.ancestor_level = 3), '') ||
      '&var-Sub_Facility=' || COALESCE((SELECT lin2.ancestor_id::text FROM org_unit_lineage lin2 WHERE lin2.org_unit_id = child_ou.id AND lin2.ancestor_level = 4), '')
    ELSE NULL END as facility_url,
    SUM(nb_patients_under_care) AS nb_patients_under_care,
    SUM(COALESCE(nb_new_patients, 0)) AS nb_patients_newly_registered,
    SUM(nb_patients_controlled) AS nb_patients_controlled,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(nb_patients_controlled) / NULLIF(SUM(NB_PATIENTS_UNDER_CARE_REGISTERED_BEFORE_THE_PAST_3_MONTHS), 0)) AS per_patients_controlled,
    SUM(nb_patients_uncontrolled) AS nb_patients_uncontrolled,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(nb_patients_uncontrolled) / NULLIF(SUM(NB_PATIENTS_UNDER_CARE_REGISTERED_BEFORE_THE_PAST_3_MONTHS), 0)) AS per_patients_uncontrolled,
    SUM(nb_patients_no_visit) AS nb_patients_no_visit,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(nb_patients_no_visit) / NULLIF(SUM(NB_PATIENTS_UNDER_CARE_REGISTERED_BEFORE_THE_PAST_3_MONTHS), 0)) AS per_patients_no_visit
FROM HEART360_PATIENTS_CATAGORY
JOIN org_unit_lineage lin ON HEART360_PATIENTS_CATAGORY.org_unit_id = lin.org_unit_id
JOIN org_units child_ou ON lin.ancestor_id = child_ou.id AND child_ou.parent_id = ((SELECT ou.id FROM org_units ou WHERE ou.id::text = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '') LIMIT 1))
LEFT JOIN heart360_patients_registered
    ON HEART360_PATIENTS_CATAGORY.ref_month = heart360_patients_registered.ref_month
    AND HEART360_PATIENTS_CATAGORY.org_unit_id = heart360_patients_registered.org_unit_id
WHERE HEART360_PATIENTS_CATAGORY.ref_month = (
    SELECT MAX(ref_month) FROM HEART360_PATIENTS_CATAGORY
    WHERE org_unit_id IN (SELECT id FROM get_descendant_ids(((SELECT ou.id FROM org_units ou WHERE ou.id::text = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '') LIMIT 1))))
    AND $__timeFilter(ref_month)
)
GROUP BY child_ou.id, child_ou.name, child_ou.level
ORDER BY child_ou.name;

list.definition: SELECT COALESCE(string_agg('[' || replace(replace(ancestor_name, ']', ')'), '[', '(') || '](' || build_drill_url(ancestor_id) || ')', ' > ' ORDER BY ancestor_level), '*Select an **Org unit***') AS __value FROM org_unit_lineage WHERE org_unit_id = (SELECT ou.id FROM org_units ou WHERE ou.id::text = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '') LIMIT 1)
list.name: breadcrumb_html

query.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(string_agg('[' || replace(replace(ancestor_name, ']', ')'), '[', '(') || '](' || build_drill_url(ancestor_id) || ')', ' > ' ORDER BY ancestor_level), '*Select an **Org unit***') AS __value FROM org_unit_lineage WHERE org_unit_id = (SELECT ou.id FROM org_units ou WHERE ou.id::text = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '') LIMIT 1)
